parsed_review.summary: CP00-947 is a descriptor-only HRX payroll/evaluation restriction bridge (risk A, 10 units: 9 PayrollRestriction tail rows RP30.P06.M02.S05-S13 + 1 EvaluationRestriction foundation row RP30.P06.M03.S01). The descriptor-verified closeout claim is supported: registry binding/requirements/case set/descriptor (packages/hrx/src/registry.js), the coverage+descriptor+contract validators (packages/hrx/src/validators.js:8707-8907), and four CP00-947 tests (packages/hrx/test/model.test.js:2465-2556) consistently encode and machine-check that every runtime, record-write, real-data, permission-bypass, policy-execution, decision-emission, and scoring/calculation flag remains false. The regenerated contract keeps CP00-947 current/latest with latest_projection HrxCp947PayrollEvaluationRestrictionBridgeDescriptor, a descriptor-only EvaluationRestriction row, and validation.valid:true. No-write/no-real-data boundaries hold (manifest implementation_summary: descriptor_only true, opens_runtime/writes_product_state/uses_real_client_data false; command-evidence no_real_data true, all listed commands exit 0). Authority boundary is correct: Claude packet read_only:true and promotes_claude_to_final_approval:false, human approval deferred to CP00-948 for runtime opening, local validation does not claim enterprise trust. Hermes control-plane usage is deterministic review/evidence only (deterministic_only:true, emits_runtime_receipt:false) and not embedded in product runtime. CP178+ review-hardening evidence is valid: auth preflight passed with well-formed JSON, forbidden_tools_present:false, review schema present, prompt 2408B within the 25600B limit, and no active untracked implementation files omitted. The construction-inspection runtime_ready:null / production_ready:false / verdict PENDING is the expected pre-review placeholder (confirmed against closed CP00-946's post-review state) and not a defect. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings. Claude is a read-only independent reviewer and not final approval authority; this receipt covers the CP00-947 descriptor-only closeout goal only and does not grant runtime opening or enterprise-trust approval.
